刚碰到沪上阿姨小姐姐，你就让我穿越？
凭啥？凭啥我还是个雏，兄弟朋友都变成老鸟了，就我是个处，我不服，我要逆天！劳资就算成了大秦王朝最不受宠的九皇子，那又如何？
父皇你既然想修炼，那就去吧，皇后妈妈，贵妇妈妈就由我来照顾了！
皇兄们？以后看到我，请叫我，后爸！
不过手底没有人，该怎么办？
那只能，系统大大救命啊！
本宫召人、集军、摆下绝世棋局，杀一切欺我、辱我、害我之人。
从深宫弃子到执棋之人，秦凡以召唤之能聚古今贤才猛将，于九龙夺嫡中杀出重围，于乱世烽烟中重整山河。当皇权在握、强敌尽灭，他剑指苍穹，声震寰宇：
“这世间，凡阻我后宫者，无论是皇帝、将军、大臣，我都一一送你们一片青青草原！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/549b06ffed017f6c32be9510da6199bc","author":"花难开意难平","author_id":"","book_id":"7571773578081750040","book_name":"皇嫂请开门，皇兄让我来检查！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#582010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6215人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":502,"name":"宫廷侯爵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=502&name=宫廷侯爵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7571779382348349976","read_count":"6215","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"633149"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"196","tags":"历史脑洞,架空,武侠,扮猪吃虎,争霸,系统,宫廷侯爵","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c20efd32c1eac0f97a0e32818b7f2875~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779395925&x-signature=zoDDs9vi4T%2FiADCCa6V%2Fk4FaNrg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110356030166","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323043845257948DD2BBE2D6E5E44"}"},"rel
